title: Move tasks to next day

posts.author: msleee (Amy Lee Walton)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to move my tasks and subtasks to the next day automatically

I have setup groups that are days of the week. If today is Monday, I want my automation to move all the items due on Monday to Tuesday so I can see what is still not done and start to track my tasks that way. Is that doable?
